Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}The hell's this!? It says, "No playing catch in the park"...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Kinda messed up, don't ya think?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}Playing catch is how kids're supposed to make friends. Adults can't just ban it 'cause they feel like it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Oh. Yeah that'd be the logical response, but...[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}I'm just sayin', if more places end up like this, it's gonna be a real problem for kids who wanna play baseball.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Right? I don't like this one bit![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}In any case, I didn't know it was banned here 'til today.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}When I first moved here, I'd play against the wall every now and then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}This whole catch thing... It's 'cause I wanted to get my arms back in shape.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}I've been thinkin' about maybe gettin' back into baseball again.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I still have no clue what I wanna do with my life.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}And if I keep tryin' to avoid it, I'll have nothin' but regret hangin' over me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Next time I'm asked what I'll be doin' in two years, I wanna have a real answer.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}That's why I'm pickin' baseball back up. You, uh, think that's the right call?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SEL_009_0_0
Dialog.Option: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Do you think it's the right call?

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Oh yeah? Heh, well that makes me feel pretty good about it, then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Well... nothin' else really comes to mind.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}Heh, that supposed to be a compliment?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Today was a bust, but we'll try again another time. Hang on to that 'til then.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Though I guess we'll have to wait 'til after you-know-what, huh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Ahh, I don't know... Honestly, I've been feelin' like this since April.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I can barely juggle what I've got on my plate as it is, let alone think about the future.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 0 25 25}Our senpais, though... They're such badasses. They're still preppin' for exams even with everything goin' on.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}We're gonna look back on all this someday and wonder how we ever got through any of it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}It wasn't all good, and we hit more than a few rough patches...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Guess you could say our short lives have been pretty wild so far, eh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Dude, you're s'posed to just nod and agree. Eh, but I guess that's how you see it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_023_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 30 0 0}Despite all that's happened, I'm glad you became our leader, {f 4 2}.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}I know I said you should do what you wanna do, but thanks for choosin' to fight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}Let's make sure this chapter of our lives ends on a happy note, alright?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_025_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}And then Hollywood'll turn our adventure into a movie![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}I'd be the lead, obviously. Dude, you'd be a shoe-in for Best Supporting Actor![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}That serious crap ain't our style, is it?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}C'mon, let's head home. We'll figure out how to sweep the Oscars on the way.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_027_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Junpei and I goofed off[n]on the way home.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: SYS_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}You have forged a powerful bond with Junpei! You can now fuse {f 0 1 35}Surt{f 0 1 27}, the lord of fire![n]{f 1 1}
